Title: Print Integer
Problem_Statement:
Read an integer and print it.

Read input from stdin and print only the exact requested output.

Title: Sum Two Integers
Problem_Statement: Read two integers and print their sum.

Title: Product Two Integers
Problem_Statement: Read two integers and print their product.

Title: Rectangle Area
Problem_Statement: Read length and breadth and print rectangle area.

Title: ASCII Value
Problem_Statement: Read one character and print its ASCII value.

Title: Subtract Two Integers
Problem_Statement: Read two integers a and b and print a - b.

Title: Divide Two Integers
Problem_Statement: Read two integers a and b and print integer quotient a / b.

Title: Remainder Two Integers
Problem_Statement: Read two integers a and b and print remainder a % b.

Title: Perimeter of Rectangle
Problem_Statement: Read length and breadth and print perimeter 2*(l+b).

Title: Area of Square
Problem_Statement: Read side s and print area s*s.

Title: Celsius to Fahrenheit
Problem_Statement: Read Celsius c and print Fahrenheit using integer formula c*9/5+32.

Title: Simple Interest
Problem_Statement: Read p r t and print simple interest p*r*t/100.

Title: Square and Cube
Problem_Statement: Read n and print square and cube space separated.

Title: Last Digit
Problem_Statement: Read non-negative integer and print last digit.

Title: Swap Two Numbers
Problem_Statement: Read a b and print b a.

Title: Fahrenheit to Celsius
Problem_Statement: Read Fahrenheit f and print Celsius using integer formula (f-32)*5/9.

Title: Average of Four
Problem_Statement: Read four integers and print integer average.

Title: Double and Triple
Problem_Statement: Read n and print 2*n and 3*n space separated.

Title: Seconds to Minutes
Problem_Statement: Read total seconds and print integer minutes.

Title: Perimeter of Circle Approx
Problem_Statement: Read integer radius r and print integer perimeter using 2*22*r/7.

Title: Quadratic Roots
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to find the roots of a quadratic equation ax2+bx+c=0.
Read coefficients a b c. Print 'Equal Real', 'Distinct Real', or 'Imaginary' based on discriminant b*b - 4*a*c.

Title: Digit Sum and Occurrence
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to find the sum of all the digits and occurrence of a digit in the number.
Read n and digit d. Print sum of digits of n, followed by space, followed by occurrence count of d in n.

Title: Sum of First N Natural Numbers
Problem_Statement: Read n and print sum using n*(n+1)/2.

Title: Distance Squared
Problem_Statement: Read x1 y1 x2 y2 and print distance squared (x2-x1)^2 + (y2-y1)^2.

Title: Total and Percentage
Problem_Statement: Read marks of 5 subjects (out of 100 each). Print total and integer percentage space separated.

Title: Arithmetic Progression Term
Problem_Statement: Read a d n and print nth term of AP: a + (n-1)*d.

Title: Cube Surface Area
Problem_Statement: Read side s and print total surface area of cube 6*s*s.
